title: Native Games & Library Upgrade
notes: Library cards now show playtime and support stronger sorting and filtering.
Shop and library views gained clearer discovery filters, improved ranking, and better status actions.
Running games can now be closed directly from the launcher, with live state refresh every 2 seconds.
Echo Protocol startup stability was fixed for the native desktop build.
Lumorix DropDash was migrated from a browser launch flow to a standalone native Tauri desktop runtime.
Release metadata, updater payload metadata, and package versions were synchronized for shipping.
